Validate Antigen Data Table

Source: R/utils.R
check_antigen_table.Rd

Internal utility to confirm that a provided antigen-level data.table matches the expected schema from validation().

Usage

check_antigen_table(antigens)

Arguments

antigens

A data.table of antigen-level immunization records, typically from validation().

Value

Invisibly returns TRUE if validation passes. Otherwise, throws an error with a list of missing columns.

Details

Checks that the table is a data.table, contains the VALID column, and includes all required fields from ANTIGEN_RETURN_COLUMNS.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
check_antigen_table(antigens)
} # }
